refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined productivity target by optimizing equipment operation and task execution efficiency.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and outcome-focused; refining it into sub-FRs clarifies specific functional aspects that contribute to productivity, enabling targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure productivity metrics (m³/h or ton/h) during representative operations and verify that sub-functions contribute to meeting or exceeding the target.
sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational efficiency to maximize throughput.
FR2: Support effective task planning and execution to minimize idle time.
FR3: Provide real-time performance monitoring and feedback to operators.

candidate_dps: DP1: Advanced vehicle control algorithms for operational efficiency.
DP2: Integrated task management system for planning and scheduling.
DP3: Real-time telemetry and feedback system for performance monitoring.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Advanced vehicle control algorithms for operational efficiency.

potential_sources: Interaction between vehicle control and task management systems.
Data exchange between telemetry and control modules.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 is logically separable but requires well-defined interfaces with DP2 and DP3 to avoid tight coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes vehicle control algorithms can be modularized and updated independently.
Risk that integration complexity with task management and telemetry may increase system coupling.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modular interface definitions early to manage coupling risks.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical and software components responsible for vehicle control and operation.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle control module sends operational data to monitoring systems.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives task commands and schedules from task management systems.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication with remote teleoperation and safety services.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of vehicle control logic; low diffusion as control algorithms are centralized.
Broader scope; control logic less contained, more diffused.
Minimal containment; control logic mostly external.
No containment; unrelated to vehicle control.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Vehicle module is the best architectural boundary to contain advanced vehicle control algorithms, minimizing diffusion and maximizing maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential interface complexity with Teleoperation and Safety Services modules.
Risk of duplicated control logic if interfaces are not well managed.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts and ownership responsibilities to mitigate diffusion risks.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FRs with clear mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Possible diffusion of control logic if interfaces with Teleoperation and Safety Services are not tightly controlled.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment scores, supporting the DP assignment.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring productivity metrics and monitoring vehicle control performance within the Vehicle module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of control functions to Vehicle module with defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Refine interface definitions between Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.
Establish ownership and update protocols for control algorithms to prevent duplication.

decision.justification: The current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meet the criteria with acceptable risks and clear verification paths.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational efficiency to maximize throughput.
FR2: Support effective task planning and execution to minimize idle time.
FR3: Provide real-time performance monitoring and feedback to operators.

revise.why: To refine interface definitions and ownership boundaries to reduce diffusion risks.

assumptions: Vehicle control algorithms can be modularized within the Vehicle module.
Interfaces with Teleoperation and Safety Services will be well-defined and stable.
open_risks: Interface complexity leading to control logic diffusion.
Potential duplication of control logic across modules.
evidence_needed: Performance data demonstrating productivity target achievement.
